title: Honeywell Forge

title: Eclipse Ditto
note: Open-source digital-twin framework used as a plausible replacement component for proprietary industrial IoT platforms.

title: ThingsBoard Open-source IoT Platform
note: Open-source IoT platform source for device connectivity, processing, visualization, SCADA, and self-hostable industrial monitoring.

title: FIWARE Open Source Platform
note: Open-source smart-solution, digital-twin, and data-space platform used as an enabler for federated industrial data systems.

title: PX4 Autopilot
note: Open-source flight-control software source for drones and unmanned vehicles.

title: ArduPilot Documentation
note: Open-source autopilot suite source for unmanned vehicles and robotics.
